title: Sales Data Cleaning & Power BI Dashboard
description: Transformed raw sales data and built an interactive Power BI dashboard for executive insights.
caseStudy:
## Problem Statement
The client had inconsistent sales data across multiple sources, making it difficult to track performance and identify trends.

## Dataset Description
Raw sales CSVs from 3 regions, 50k+ rows with inconsistent formatting, missing values, and duplicate entries.

## Cleaning Steps
- Removed duplicate records using Python Pandas
- Standardized date formats across all regions
- Merged regional files using SQL UNION operations
- Handled missing values with appropriate imputation strategies

## Analysis Approach
- Used Pandas for initial data cleaning and exploration
- SQL for complex aggregations and joins
- Built interactive Power BI dashboard with drill-down capabilities
- Created KPI cards for quick insights

## Business Insight
Identified underperforming regions (15% below average) and discovered strong seasonal trends in Q4, leading to optimized inventory planning and targeted marketing campaigns.

title: Customer Churn Analysis with Python & SQL
description: Analyzed telecom churn data, cleaned with Pandas, and delivered actionable insights.
caseStudy:
## Problem Statement
High churn rate (28%) in telecom subscribers was impacting revenue and customer lifetime value.

## Dataset Description
Customer records with 20+ features including usage logs, billing history, support tickets, and churn labels (25,000 customers).

## Cleaning Steps
- Handled missing values in usage columns using median imputation
- Encoded categorical variables (contract type, payment method)
- Removed outliers in billing amounts using IQR method
- Created new features from date columns (tenure, days since last support ticket)

## Analysis Approach
- SQL for feature engineering and data aggregation
- Pandas for exploratory data analysis and visualization
- Correlation analysis to identify key churn indicators
- Logistic regression modeling to predict high-risk customers

## Business Insight
Predicted high-risk customers with 82% accuracy. Found that customers with month-to-month contracts and electronic check payment had 3x higher churn rate. Recommended retention strategies including contract incentives and payment method diversification, projected to reduce churn by 12%.

title: E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard
description: Built comprehensive analytics dashboard to track KPIs and user behavior patterns.
caseStudy:
## Problem Statement
E-commerce platform lacked unified view of customer behavior, sales performance, and marketing effectiveness.

## Dataset Description
Transaction data (100k+ orders), user behavior logs, marketing campaign data, and product catalog information.

## Cleaning Steps
- Standardized product categories across multiple sources
- Removed test transactions and internal orders
- Validated and corrected currency conversions
- Aggregated multiple data sources into unified data warehouse

## Analysis Approach
- Designed star schema data model in SQL
- Created calculated measures for conversion rate, AOV, LTV
- Built Power BI dashboard with real-time refresh
- Implemented role-based access for different stakeholders

## Business Insight
Identified that mobile users had 40% lower conversion rate but higher average order value. Recommended mobile UX improvements and targeted campaigns, resulting in 18% increase in mobile revenue within 2 months.
